mnemonics: SCARF: Size, Complexity, Application, Resources, Functionality
keyPoints: Categorized by Size (Small, Medium, Large, Very Large)
Categorized by Type (Web, Mobile, Desktop, Embedded, AI/ML)
Categorized by Development Approach (Waterfall, Agile, DevOps, Hybrid)
commonMistakes: Assuming all projects fit a single category; many are hybrids.
Underestimating the impact of project size on required processes and resources.
Confusing project type (e.g., web app) with the development methodology (e.g., Agile).
